title: Verify Engagement section shows recommended content if consumption is over 90%
description: Test that the Engagement section recommends similar content after a user finishes a piece of content.
preconditions: User has watched a piece of content for more than 90% of its duration

steps.description: 1. Watch 95% of a movie in the 'Action' genre.
2. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub.

expected_result: The section shows the top 1 recommended content from a similar genre (e.g., another 'Action' movie).
